introSection: Poogee Penguin's Spin Out is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Santa's Village in Jefferson, New Hampshire, USA. The ride opened on May 29, 2016.
fullText:
Poogee Penguin's Spin Out is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Santa's Village in Jefferson, New Hampshire, USA. The ride opened on May 29, 2016.



Riders sit facing back-to-back.
